---
title: "Duckweed morphology analysis"
---

## Introduction

This document analyses duckweed morphology (area per frond and dry weight per frond) under different treatments.

### Load libraries

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(readr)
library(car)
library(lme4)
library(ggpubr)
```

### Data import

```{r data-import, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df <- read.table("data_morphology.txt", sep = "\t", header = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    area_frond   = parse_number(as.character(area_frond)),
    weight_frond = parse_number(as.character(weight_frond))
  )
```

### Plot settings

```{r plot-settings, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
base_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# Color scale
treat_colors <- scale_fill_manual(
  values = c(control = "#0072B2", heated = "#D55E00")
)
```

### Dry weight per frond

```{r panel-a-weight, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=3.6, fig.height=4}
df_wt <- df %>% filter(!is.na(weight_frond))

px2 <- ggplot(df_wt, aes(x = treatment, y = weight_frond, fill = treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.8,
    outlier.color = "black"
  ) +
  treat_colors +
  labs(
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Dry weight (mg)"
  ) +
  base_theme

px2
```

#### Statistical analysis - Dry weight

```{r stats-weight, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
model_wt <- lmer(weight_frond ~ treatment + (1 | block), data = df_wt)
Anova(model_wt, test = "F")
summary(model_wt)
```

### Area per frond

```{r panel-b-area, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=3.6, fig.height=4}
df_area <- df %>% filter(!is.na(area_frond))

px1 <- ggplot(df_area, aes(x = treatment, y = area_frond, fill = treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.8,
    outlier.color = "black"
  ) +
  treat_colors +
  labs(
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Area per frond (mm²)"
  ) +
  base_theme

px1
```

#### Statistical analysis - Weight and Area 

```{r stats-area, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
model_area <- lmer(area_frond ~ treatment + (1 | block), data = df_area)
Anova(model_area, test = "F")
summary(model_area)

model_wt <- lmer(weight_frond ~ treatment + (1 | block), data = df_wt)
Anova(model_wt, test = "F")
summary(model_wt)

```
